building_row.open_questions: Get the exact pet addendum in writing, confirm whether packages go to a package room or staffed desk, ask for the full recurring monthly cost stack beyond base rent and listed fees, and only tour units that face away from Sunset and the rooftop skydecks or theater areas.
building_row.notes: Hanover Hollywood is one of the stronger amenity and operations packages on paper, with coworking-style space, package service, controlled access, video patrol, key fob entry, in-unit laundry, and a large body of resident reviews. The main issue for this search is quiet. The property sits directly on Sunset near Hollywood and Vine, Apartments.com tags the location as Busy with a 67 SoundScore, and the building itself markets rooftop skydecks and an indoor or outdoor theater. # Hanover Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: hanover-hollywood-6200-w-sunset-blvd
- Address: 6200 W Sunset Blvd, LA 90028
- Primary URL: https://www.hanoverhollywood.com/
- Management company: Hanover Company / HRS Property Management Inc.
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 2 (medium, evidence count 4)
- Management: 4 (medium, evidence count 4)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 7)
- Community stability: 4 (medium, evidence count 4)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: medium
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site says Hanover Hollywood is located on Sunset Boulevard in Hollywood, steps from Hollywood and Vine.. Source: Hanover Hollywood official site (https://www.hanoverhollywood.com/). Note: Official site says the community is located on Sunset Boulevard in Hollywood, Los Angeles, steps from the historic intersection of Hollywood and Vine.
- [official] The official site markets a 24 or 7 fitness center, resort-style pool, rooftop skydecks, and indoor or outdoor theater style amenities.. Source: Hanover Hollywood official amenities pages (https://www.hanoverhollywood.com/los-angeles/hanover-hollywood/amenities/). Note: Official marketing lists a state-of-the-art 24 or 7 fitness center, expansive resort-style pool, rooftop skydecks with entertaining spaces, and an indoor or outdoor theater.
- [official] The official site says pets are allowed up to two per apartment, with dog breed restrictions and additional fees or deposits that are not publicly itemized.. Source: Hanover Hollywood official pet policy (https://www.hanoverhollywood.com/p-2x2). Note: Official pet policy says up to two pets are allowed per apartment, some breed restrictions apply to dogs, and additional fees and deposits may apply.
- [official] The official floor plan pages say homes include premium appliance packages and smart home capabilities.. Source: Hanover Hollywood floor plans (https://www.hanoverhollywood.com/los-angeles/hanover-hollywood/conventional/). Note: Floor plan page says designer floor plans feature premium appliance packages, smart home capabilities, and spa inspired bathrooms.
- [review] Apartments.com lists package service, controlled access, maintenance on site, property manager on site, video patrol, 24 hour access, and key fob entry.. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/hanover-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/9zcp565/). Note: Property services list includes package service, controlled access, maintenance on site, property manager on site, video patrol, 24 hour access, and key fob entry.
- [review] Apartments.com shows application, admin, pet, parking, and storage fees, but also warns that some mandatory or optional charges may be excluded.. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/hanover-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/9zcp565/). Note: Visible fee stack includes $50 application, $50 administrative fee, $75 monthly pet rent, $85 to $225 parking, and $50 to $125 storage, with a disclaimer that fees may exclude utilities or other services.
- [review] Apartments.com shows a 5.0 blended score and 62 renter reviews for Hanover Hollywood.. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/hanover-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/9zcp565/). Note: Property rating section displays 5.0 out of 5 with 62 renter reviews, though the parsed page also contains an internal inconsistency about review display that lowers confidence slightly.
- [review] Apartments.com gives the location a 67 SoundScore and labels traffic and nearby businesses as Busy.. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/hanover-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/9zcp565/). Note: SoundScore is 67 out of 100, with traffic listed as Busy and businesses listed as Busy.
- [review] BBB shows one customer review alleging a quoted monthly rent changed by roughly $400 within a few hours.. Source: Better Business Bureau (https://www.bbb.org/us/ca/los-angeles/profile/apartments/hanover-hollywood-1216-1644146/customer-reviews). Note: BBB lists a 1 out of 5 average from one customer review; the visible complaint dated 11/21/2023 says the quoted monthly rent changed by about $400 within roughly two hours.
- [news] Urbanize describes Hanover Hollywood as a seven-story, 270-unit mixed-use project with ground-floor retail and basement parking.. Source: Urbanize LA (https://la.urbanize.city/project/hanover-hollywood). Note: Urbanize project page describes the completed development as a seven-story, 270-unit apartment project with retail and parking.

## Open questions
- Get the exact pet addendum in writing, confirm whether packages go to a package room or staffed desk, ask for the full recurring monthly cost stack beyond base rent and listed fees, and only tour units that face away from Sunset and the rooftop skydecks or theater areas.

## Notes
- Hanover Hollywood is one of the stronger amenity and operations packages on paper, with coworking-style space, package service, controlled access, video patrol, key fob entry, in-unit laundry, and a large body of resident reviews. The main issue for this search is quiet. The property sits directly on Sunset near Hollywood and Vine, Apartments.com tags the location as Busy with a 67 SoundScore, and the building itself markets rooftop skydecks and an indoor or outdoor theater. Management signals are better than average because the review base is large and there is an on-site manager, but pricing clarity is only partial because Apartments.com warns fees may exclude some charges and BBB shows at least one complaint alleging a quoted rent jumped by roughly $400 within hours.
